problem id: b80795b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  10100010 -> 00010000
  11101010 -> 01010110
  10001110 -> 01110000
  00100001 -> 00001000
  00100111 -> 00111000
  01110111 -> 10111011
  01110100 -> 10100011

query: 01000010
predicted answer: 00010000
